title: Spec: Design 6LoWPAN over LoRa adaptation layer
description: Listed as 'open question' but foundational. LoRa is not 802.15.4 — Zephyr's 6LoWPAN assumes 802.15.4 MAC semantics (ACKs, CSMA-CA timing, frame formats). Need concrete adaptation layer design covering: frame format mapping, ACK handling, timing parameters, integration with SCHC.
close_reason: Resolved: Use SCHC (RFC 8724) instead of 6LoWPAN IPHC. No 802.15.4 anywhere. Stack: IPv6 → SCHC → LICHEN Link Layer → LoRa PHY. Zephyr requires custom L2. Updated spec/03-adaptation.md.
